notes: Deterministic, FAA-style commercial IFR gate-to-gate call catalog for IFATC Companion. The app simulates PRIVATE ATC for the user only and is never staffed/live ATC for other multiplayer users. Ramp/apron/company-ramp calls are simulated LOCAL/non-FAA procedures and vary by airport/operator. UNICOM automation broadcasts pilot intentions/status only and never carries ATC clearances or ramp approvals. Sources: FAA JO 7110.65, FAA AIM, FAA Pilot/Controller Glossary, FAA Chart Supplement. Any item marked needsReview must be validated before being treated as authoritative.

calls.trigger: Pilot has the current ATIS / manually entered information letter.
validationRules: Refer to the current information letter when appropriate.
calls.notes: ATIS code may come from Infinite Flight when available or be entered manually.

calls.trigger: Clearance mode = PDC-style or Auto for an airline flight.
calls.atcTemplate: PDC {callsign}: Cleared to {destination} via {sidOrRoute}, climb via SID except maintain {initialAltitude}, expect {cruise} {timeAfterDeparture} after departure, departure frequency {departureFreq}, squawk {squawk}.
calls.ttsNotes: Presented as a text clearance card; not necessarily a voice exchange.
validationRules: PDC mode must NOT force a full voice readback unless the user selects voice fallback.
calls.notes: Commercial aircraft often receive pre-departure clearances by data link.

calls.trigger: Clearance mode = Voice. Pilot reports ready to copy.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, cleared to {destination} via the {sid} departure, then as filed. Climb via SID except maintain {initialAltitude}. Expect {cruise} {timeAfterDeparture} after departure. Departure frequency {departureFreq}. Squawk {squawk}.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: Cleared to {destination} via the {sid}, then as filed, climb via SID except maintain {initialAltitude}, expect {cruise} {timeAfterDeparture} after departure, departure {departureFreq}, squawk {squawk}, {callsign}.
calls.ttsNotes: FL for flight levels; 'point' for frequencies; spell squawk digit-by-digit.
validationRules: Voice clearance requires a full readback of all safety-critical elements.
calls.notes: If no SID is filed, substitute 'via the filed route'. Controller confirms 'readback correct'.

calls.trigger: Gate ready; pilot calls Ramp.
validationRules: If gate unknown use 'at the gate'.
calls.notes: Alternate: 'request push and start'. Ramp is simulated local/company procedure, not FAA ATC.

calls.trigger: Ramp approves pushback.
validationRules: Prefer 'push approved'/'pushback approved', never 'cleared for pushback'.
If direction unknown use 'push approved, advise ready to taxi'.
calls.notes: Ramp may give tail/face direction only when gate+ramp data are known.

calls.trigger: Alley/ramp congestion.
calls.rampTemplate: {callsign}, hold position, traffic entering the alley.
validationRules: Ramp may use 'hold position', 'give way', 'continue', never runway/movement-area authority.

calls.trigger: Engine-start coordination required by ramp setting.
validationRules: If engine start is company/crew only, show a System advisory instead.
calls.notes: Many US operators treat start as company/crew procedure (interphone).

calls.trigger: Tug/headset pushback (non-radio, private text-only).
calls.rampTemplate: Ground crew: Brakes set? ... Towbar disconnected, bypass pin removed, hand signal on the left. Have a good flight.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: Brakes set. ... See you on the left, {callsign}.
calls.ttsNotes: Crew comms, not radio; never sent to UNICOM.
validationRules: Use a separate Ground Crew / Interphone channel, not Ramp radio.
calls.notes: Optional simulation.

calls.trigger: Push complete, ready to taxi in the non-movement area.
calls.rampTemplate: {callsign}, taxi via the alley to spot {spot}.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: Taxi via the alley to spot {spot}, {callsign}.
validationRules: Avoid 'cleared to taxi'. Ramp taxi is limited to non-movement areas.
calls.notes: Use 'give way', 'continue', 'proceed straight ahead on the inner alley' as needed.

calls.trigger: Aircraft reaches the spot / movement-area boundary.
validationRules: If spot unknown: 'proceed to the movement-area boundary and contact Ground'.
calls.notes: Ground (FAA ATC) controls the movement area after this handoff.

calls.trigger: Pilot reports ready to taxi at the spot/gate.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, runway {runway}, taxi via {taxiRoute}, hold short runway {holdShortRunway}.
validationRules: Never 'cleared to taxi'.
Always include the runway assignment.
A taxi instruction to a runway does NOT authorize entering/crossing any runway.
Conservative fallback: 'taxi via assigned taxiways, hold short of all runways'.
calls.notes: First pilot readback of a taxi instruction must include the runway assignment.

calls.trigger: Taxi route requires crossing a runway.
validationRules: Runway crossings require an explicit clearance and readback including the runway.
Do not combine implicit crossing with a taxi instruction unless explicitly stated.

calls.trigger: Aircraft must hold short of a runway.
validationRules: Roger/Wilco are NOT acceptable readbacks for a hold-short.

calls.trigger: Tower sequences the aircraft onto the runway to wait.
validationRules: Use 'line up and wait', never 'position and hold'.
No conditional line-up dependent on landing/departing traffic.

calls.trigger: Aircraft is at/lined up on the departure runway and ready.
validationRules: Must include the runway number.
Use 'cleared for takeoff', never 'takeoff at your discretion' or 'cleared for departure'.
calls.notes: May also include initial heading and climb when a departure heading is known.

calls.trigger: Tower cancels the takeoff clearance / urgent stop.
validationRules: Urgent form: '{callsign}, stop immediately.'
calls.notes: Not yet wired into the automatic flow; templates available.

calls.trigger: Pilot checks in passing altitude with Departure.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, Houston Departure, radar contact, climb and maintain {altitude}.
validationRules: Use 'radar contact' only after radar identification.
'with you' must NOT be generated in pilot check-ins.
calls.notes: Climb-via-SID variant preserves published restrictions.

calls.trigger: Control passes to Center.
validationRules: 'Contact' triggers a pilot frequency readback and state transition.
'Monitor' is distinct from 'contact'.

calls.trigger: A STAR is filed and crossing restrictions apply.
validationRules: 'Descend via'/'climb via' preserve published restrictions unless an explicit exception is given.
If cleared lower with 'except maintain', the readback must include the exception.
calls.notes: Plain 'descend and maintain {altitude}' used when no STAR is filed.

calls.trigger: Pilot requests ride reports along route.
validationRules: No relevant data: 'no significant ride reports along your route at this time'.
Weather service failure: 'unable weather update at this time' (never fabricate data).
calls.notes: Severity-filtered from PIREPs/SIGMETs/G-AIRMETs by route corridor and altitude band.

calls.trigger: Approach vectors the aircraft to final.
validationRules: Heading/speed/altitude assignments must be read back.

calls.trigger: Aircraft is positioned for the final approach.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, {miles} miles from {fix}, turn {turn} heading {heading}, maintain {altitude} until established on the localizer, cleared {approachType} runway {runway} approach.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: {turn} heading {heading}, maintain {altitude} until established, cleared {approachType} runway {runway} approach, {callsign}.
validationRules: Approach clearance must include the approach type and runway.
Include 'maintain ... until established' when vectoring to final.
calls.notes: Visual variant: 'cleared visual approach runway {runway}' after 'report airport in sight'.

calls.trigger: Aircraft on final, runway available.
validationRules: Must include the runway number.
Use 'cleared to land'.
If not yet cleared: 'continue'.

calls.trigger: Tower or pilot initiates a go-around.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, go around. Fly runway heading, climb and maintain {altitude}.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: Going around, runway heading, climb and maintain {altitude}, {callsign}.
calls.notes: Templates available; not yet wired into the automatic flow.

calls.trigger: After touchdown, exit the runway and contact Ground.
calls.atcTemplate: {callsign}, exit the runway when able, contact Ground {groundFreq} once on the taxiway.
validationRules: Specific exit: 'turn left at {taxiway}, hold short runway {runway}'.

calls.trigger: Pilot clear of runway, requests taxi to gate.
validationRules: Taxi to gate does NOT authorize a runway crossing unless explicitly included.
On entering the ramp/non-movement area, transition to Ramp or end ATC service.

calls.trigger: Aircraft reaches the ramp boundary / spot inbound.
validationRules: Only present when the ramp profile requires a ramp layer.
calls.notes: Ground hands off to the simulated arrival Ramp.

calls.trigger: Pilot inbound to gate on the ramp.
calls.rampTemplate: {callsign}, proceed to gate {gate} via the inner alley.
calls.pilotReadbackTemplate: Proceed to gate {gate} via the inner alley, {callsign}.
validationRules: Hold-for-traffic / gate-occupied variants available.
Never 'cleared'.
calls.notes: Gate occupied: 'gate {gate} is occupied, hold short of the alley'.

calls.trigger: Aircraft stopped at the gate.
calls.notes: System advisory: '{callsign} parked at {gate}. Flight complete.'
